3Increase damage by 30%. Hits one additional target. Increase duration by 1 second. n/aSteel x1600Hydrogen Crystal x200
4Increase damage by 40%.n/aSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x800
5Increase damage by 50%. Impoved targeting arc. n/aSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase damage by 60%. Increase range by 20%. Improved targeting arc. Hits two additional targets.n/aSteel x12800Iridium x800
